'''Starship Outfitters''' was a small business run by the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Tulagn]] on the planet [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]]. On one of the main boulevards of [[Wroona spaceport]], it was packed full of supplies to cater to the needs of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]]. While some tough-looking guards watched the front, Tulagn would work the back counter.

Tulagn's Starship Outfitters was also a front for the Rodian's fencing business. It was run from a back room accessible only from an entrance at the end of a long winding alley. The back room was stacked with unmarked crates. There, Tulagn negotiated with suppliers, such as [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]], often attempting to rip them off.

{{Company-stub}}
